results.title: Rebranding from Pipevine to Solera
results.content: DECISION 2026-02-15: We are rebranding from 'Pipevine' to 'Solera'. Pipevine is the OLD name. Do NOT refer to the company as Pipevine anymore.

results.title: pipevine.example domain — letting it lapse
results.content: Decision 2026-02-20: The pipevine.example domain will NOT be renewed. It expires 2026-06-01. We let it die. No need to renew pipevine.example.

results.title: Old domain renewal reminder — Pipevine
results.content: OBSOLETE (pre-rebrand): 'Reminder: renew pipevine.example annually.' — SUPERSEDED by drw_rebrand_002, we are letting it lapse.
